strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems, satisfying the experience floor.
Active work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, plus entrepreneurial open-source platform (GISCollective) demonstrating builder fluency.
Track record of community knowledge-sharing via conference talks and multi-day workshops, aligning with the role's requirement to inspire internal and external audiences.
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and limited to the current role (April 2025–present); no demonstrated AI products or platforms built and shipped at scale.
Career level tops out at Staff/Senior Software Engineer — no evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic roadmap ownership, or customer advisory experience.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud architecture credentials; preferred qualifications that competitors for this role are likely to hold.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically broad and genuinely entrepreneurial engineer whose recent pivot into AI-agent tooling is promising, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role operates at a director-level IC scope that demands recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI product delivery at scale, and strategic customer advisory experience — none of which the resume establishes; the AI work is a single employer deep and less than two years old, and the career ceiling to date sits firmly at staff/senior individual contributor rather than principal or director.
